summary: Nvidia remains a large-cap momentum leader, with continued AI demand and frequent analyst coverage supporting strong relative strength.
Microsoft has durable momentum from cloud and AI-related growth, making it a liquid large-cap fallback when live catalysts are unclear.
Meta continues to show strong operational momentum, with advertising and AI initiatives keeping investor sentiment positive.
Amazon is still one of the highest-momentum mega-caps, supported by AWS, retail efficiency, and AI infrastructure spending.
Alphabet has positive momentum from search, cloud, and AI product expansion, keeping it a liquid large-cap name with strong trend support.
Broadcom has been a major momentum stock on AI networking and semiconductor demand, with strong investor sponsorship.
Netflix has held strong momentum on earnings resilience, pricing power, and continued subscriber engagement.
Uber has had persistent positive momentum on profitability improvement and scale benefits across mobility and delivery.
Oracle remains a strong large-cap momentum name as cloud and AI infrastructure demand support the stock.
Eli Lilly has strong momentum tied to blockbuster obesity and diabetes drug demand plus continued pipeline execution.
Novo Nordisk remains a global momentum leader on obesity and diabetes franchise strength, making it a liquid large-cap fallback.
CrowdStrike has strong momentum from cybersecurity demand and recurring revenue growth, with traders often favoring the name on every dip.
Palo Alto Networks has positive momentum from platform consolidation trends and cybersecurity spending strength.
Arista Networks has strong relative strength from AI-driven networking demand and hyperscale customer spending.
Micron has momentum from memory pricing recovery and AI-related demand trends.
Western Digital has been one of 2026’s strongest performers, reflecting sharp momentum in storage and memory names.
Seagate has strong relative strength on the same storage-cycle improvement and AI-linked demand tailwinds.
Teradyne has been a major 2026 winner, with momentum tied to semiconductor test equipment demand.
Ciena has strong momentum from optical networking demand and improved investor sentiment around AI data-center buildouts.
Comfort Systems USA has strong relative strength as infrastructure and mechanical-services demand stay firm.
Corning has positive momentum from improving specialty materials and fiber-optic demand.
Sandisk has extreme 2026 momentum, making it a clear high-relative-strength name in US-listed equities.
Texas Pacific Land has strong momentum and premium market perception due to its unique energy and land-royalty exposure.
Moderna has been one of the strongest 2026 performers, with momentum tied to turnaround expectations and pipeline focus.
Marathon Petroleum has positive momentum from refined-product margins and strong earnings power.
